sources.title: 零之使魔
sources.usage: 整理哈尔凯尼亚、四元素/虚无魔法、使魔系统、托里斯汀与主要人物。

exclusions: 源中 {{user}} 视为 RP 玩家/使魔槽位，不作为固定人物索引。
排除 chat 状态栏、格式模板、技术控制与成人化细节。
registryNotes: 结构修复：conflictLog 为空表示当前未登记冲突；需后续人工复核是否确无冲突。
Source-quality repair 2026-06-22: conflictLog empty classified as not-reviewed; absence of entries is not evidence of confirmed no conflicts unless later reviewed.

conflictReviewStatus.reviewScope: registry metadata only; no new canon/source facts asserted
conflictReviewStatus.rationale: Empty conflictLog means no conflicts are currently registered in the curated file; it has not been independently reviewed as conflict-free.
